manual_override.reason: Deliberate owner decision (2026-06-10) to set floor=latest=latest_known=2.1.170 — support only the newest CC, renewing the 2026-06-07 strict bump (which pinned 2.1.168) for the Fable 5 CLI release. This STRICT bump keeps overriding the #1945 capstone freeze per explicit owner request; auto-bump policy resumes after expires. NOTE: this DELIBERATELY DEVIATES from the steady-state `policy` field ("latest + 3 previous minors") — floor is pinned to latest+0 here. The `policy` field is intentionally left unchanged because cc-support-window-bump.yml reads it to recompute the floor once this override expires; the policy resumes then.

comment: Single source of truth for OrchestKit's CC support window. All other floor declarations (CLAUDE.md, src/hooks/src/lib/cc-version-matrix.ts MIN_CC_VERSION, manifests/ork.json) derive from this via scripts/stamp-cc-support.mjs. `latest_known` (the highest CC version ork's adoption covers — distinct from `latest`, the support-window head; they diverge while a manual_override freezes the floor) stamps LATEST_KNOWN_CC, the version-check adoption-nudge threshold. Updated by .github/workflows/cc-support-window-bump.yml.
